summary: Fixed pagination navigation styling - reduced border size, removed background from current page, made current page bold
userRevisions: Change hover border from 2px to 1px (border instead of border-2)
Remove gray background from current/selected page number

changes.description: Reduced hover border thickness from 2px to 1px
Removed gray background from current page number
Made current page number bold to distinguish it

paginationNumbers.defaultState: no border, no background, flat appearance
paginationNumbers.currentState: bold, no background, no hover effect

technicalNotes: Changed border-2 (2px) to border (1px) for more subtle hover effect
Removed bg-charcoal/50 from .current - now has no background
Added font-bold to .current for visual distinction without background
Current page maintains text-charcoal color and pointer-events-none
Hover effect still excludes .current and .dots via :not() selectors

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
